titleStmt.title: SII 16.297: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 297. (A.R. No. 697 of 1917.) KŌVELAKUṆṬLA, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the courtyard of the Raṅgasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1506, Tāraṇa, Kārtika śu. 15, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1584 A.D., November 7, (Saturday).

registers a grant of the income from the temple lands in Chintalakuṇṭa, Viṭṭhalāpuram, China-Koperla, and Savadaradinne as also the income from the varttana in Kōgilakuṇṭla and other villages to god Paṇḍaraṅgi Viṭṭhalēśvara of Kōgilakuṇṭla for various services and for a feeding house (Rāmānuja-kūṭam) by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandēla Veṅkaṭādrirāju, grandson of Narasiṅgarāju and son of Kṛishṇamarāju of Ātrēya-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1506 Agunēṭi tāraṇa saṁvatsara kārtika śu
dha 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa vīra śrīraṁggarāyadēvamahārāyalugāru
penugoṁḍa paṭṭaṇamaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai sā
mrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhma
ṁḍḍanāyakuṁḍaina kōgilakuṁṭla śrīpaṁḍaraṁga viṭhalēśvaru
la divyaśrīpādapadmaṁbulaku Ātrēyagōtrāpastaṁbbasū
tra yajuśākhādhyāyulaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara naṁde
la narasiṁgarāju pautuṁḍunu kriṣṇamarāju putṛṁḍaina veṁ
kaṭādrirājugāru Anaṁttamulaina daṁḍamulu samarpiṁ
ci Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ mā nāyaṁkarānaku cellēkōgila
kuṁṭla śīmalōnu viṭhalēśvarulaku Amṛtapaḷaku Aṁgaraṁgavai
bhavālaku rāmānujakūṭānaku pallakiśāvaku tiruṇāḷa ma
hōtsavālaku Ivi mōdalaIna śāvalaku celivacē grāmālu
ciṁttakuṁṭṭa viṭhalāpuraṁ cinakōperla savadaradinna grāmamu
lō tiruṇāḷaku viḍicina polamunu kōgilakuṁṭlanu pallelanu
nnu cellivaccē kṣētrālu vartanalunnu kōgilakuṁṭlagrāmaṁ mānakabha
ttanu kolayattana yannikalavalla vacēvinni yī tathātithi sōmagrahaThe meaning of this expression is not clear.
ṇapuṇyakālamaṁdu sarvamānyaṁ cēstimi yiṁduku marē Ā
taṁkālu lēkuṁḍānu naḍupudumu yī dharmānaku yavaru ta
pinā vāru kāśilō gōbrāṁhmala caṁpina pāpāna pōduru ta
ma tallitaṁḍṟlanu kāśilō caṁpina pāpāna pōduru māniśi pu
nukalō kukkamāṁsaṁ peṭṭuka surapōśuka kāśilō tinna pāpāna pō
duru yiṭani Icina dharmaśāsanaṁ . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dā
nāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanā da
cyutaṁ padaṁ . yēkaiva bhaginī lokē sarvvēṣāmēva bhūbhujā[ṁ .*]
na bhōjyā na karagrāṁhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā . svadattā
ṁ paradattāṁ vvā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhivarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . madvaṁśajāḥ para
mahīpativaṁśajā vā yē bhūmipāḥ satatamujva
la dharmmacittāḥ . maddharmmamēva satataṁ paripāla
yaṁtti tvatpādukadvayamahaṁ śirasā vahāmi .
maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.297 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
